data.content: Implementation review approved. 13 new tests across 6 files (362 lines). All tests pass (849 total), 95.40% coverage, make sanity green. Covers: CLI warn-not-reject (TOML+JSON), output fallback chain, access_hint/output_hint propagation, resolve_output_specific_sections unit tests, per-action StepMetadata variation, and legacy global output backward compat. No production code changes. No security issues. All files under 500 lines.
